milestones.name: Project Genesis
milestones.description: The initial bootstrap of the GAIA sovereign mesh architecture.

milestones.name: Sovereign Shield Hardening
milestones.description: Implementation of codebase hardening and Digital Immune System foundation.

milestones.name: Cascade Routing & Proprioception
milestones.description: Activation of Nano-triage and full temporal/atmospheric awareness.

milestones.name: Sovereign Duality — Trinity to Two-Tier Transition
milestones.description: Consolidated three-tier Trinity (Nano E2B + Core Qwen 2B + Prime Qwen 8B) into two-tier Sovereign Duality: Operator (Gemma 4 E4B, 8.9GB always-on) and Sovereign (Gemma 4 26B-A4B MoE, 4.6GB JIT Expert Offloading). Nano tier deprecated. Unified Gemma 4 model family.

milestones.name: SDH Protocol Design
milestones.description: Sovereign Duality Handoff protocol formalized: quality-gated AWAKE↔FOCUSING transitions, subprocess isolation for deterministic VRAM release, stale handoff reconciliation, and VRAM budget validation. Operator at 8.9GB baseline with 5.9GB free; FOCUSING mode yields 10.2GB free for Sovereign reasoning.
